sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n115924" key="yuxorrofe/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ψῡχορροφέω</orth>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ψυχή</etym>) <sense id="n115924.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">suck out the life,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1608.tlg001:p.128B" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phryn.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">PS</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.128B.</biblScope> </bibl>; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ψυχορόφους.</foreign> </sense> <sense n="II" id="n115924.1" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ψῦχος</etym>) <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">drink cold water,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0497.tlg001:259" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pl.Com.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">259</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
